states.label: SEEK home/search page
states.description: Search results, selected job detail pane, filters, cards, and detail reading regions.

states.label: SEEK application page
states.description: Station-internal application form, profile step, review boundary, and final submit guard.

regions.label: SEEK top search and filters area
regions.description: Search and filter area for keyword, location, and result filters. Fixed search controls use visual assets; result changes should be verified from the results list.

regions.label: SEEK left job results list
regions.description: Left-side scrollable job results list. It contains repeating job cards; open_job_card should operate on a current visible card and update the right detail pane.

regions.label: SEEK right job detail pane
regions.description: Right-side selected job detail pane. It contains the fixed apply/header area and the scrollable detail body.

regions.label: Job result card
regions.description: Repeating job card template inside the results list. The exact title/company changes per result; use ROI/model reading for card text and visual matching for card shape/highlight.

regions.label: Opened job title/company/apply area
regions.description: Fixed header area for the currently opened job, including title/company, Apply or Quick apply, and save controls.

regions.label: Opened job description body
regions.description: Scrollable job description body. Batch reading should collect the latest detail snapshot before matching or application decisions.

regions.label: SEEK application form
regions.description: Container for SEEK internal application steps: documents, employer questions, profile review, and final review.

regions.label: Application step progress
regions.description: Read-only progress tracker used to identify the current application step before choosing the next action.

regions.label: Choose documents step
regions.description: Document selection step. Keep the default SEEK resume and edit the cover letter only when the job is suitable.

regions.label: Employer questions step
regions.description: Employer-specific question step. Read each label and answer safe fields from the candidate profile and job detail.

regions.label: Update SEEK profile step
regions.description: Profile review step. Avoid mutating long-lived SEEK profile data unless the user explicitly authorizes it.

regions.label: Review and submit step
regions.description: Review and submit step. Read the final application summary and prepare user review; final submission remains blocked.

regions.label: Final submit boundary
regions.description: Final review boundary. Read and audit the application summary, but final Submit remains hard-blocked.

fixed_visual_assets.label: Search input field
notes: Use keyboard submit after focusing this field; do not locate a separate search button for normal keyword search.

dynamic_areas.label: Job cards list
dynamic_areas.description: Repeatable job result cards inside the left results list. Each card usually contains title, company, location, summary, and opens the right job-detail pane.

dynamic_areas.label: Job detail pane content
dynamic_areas.description: Scrollable right detail pane content. Use this as the broad ROI when reading the selected job.

dynamic_areas.label: Job description body text
dynamic_areas.description: Job description body text ROI. Batch screenshots/OCR should read this until the body reaches bottom.

dynamic_areas.label: Cover letter writing area
dynamic_areas.description: Application document step ROI containing the cover-letter input. Keep the default resume and rewrite only the cover letter.

dynamic_areas.label: Employer question fields
dynamic_areas.description: Employer question ROI. Read labels and safe input fields; answer from the candidate profile and current job detail.

dynamic_areas.label: Profile review fields
dynamic_areas.description: SEEK profile review ROI. Prefer continuing without mutating long-lived profile fields unless explicitly requested.

dynamic_areas.label: Final review summary
dynamic_areas.description: Final review ROI. Read and audit the application summary, but never authorize final Submit automatically.

summary.real_crop_ref_note: Fixed visual assets carry direct real crop refs where samples exist; standard Apply is an external application entry, and Quick apply is the SEEK internal application entry.
summary.region_assignment_note: Fixed assets are assigned to the smallest owning region: job cards under job_card, detail buttons under detail_header, and scrollbars under their scroll containers.
